data.title: SEALSQ sees 66% revenue growth in FY25, eyes big 2026. Achieved $18M revenue with $8M in Q4 (vs. $4M last year).
data.description: SEALSQ Corp, traded as LAES on NASDAQ, saw a decline in its stock on Tuesday following the release of its FY25 preliminary results and FY26 guidance. The company reported revenue of $18 million for 2025, reflecting a 66% increase from the previous year. In the fourth quarter alone, SEALSQ generated $8 million in revenue, compared to $4 million in the same period in the previous year. This substantial growth in revenue was not enough to prevent a drop in LAES stock value as investors processed the information. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Jazz in the Gardens 2026 lineup grows with icons like Isley Brothers, Stephanie Mills, El DeBarge, Ludacris' 25th Anniversary Set, Nelly & Ashanti. March 7-8 festival in Miami Gardens.
data.description: The highly anticipated 2026 Jazz in the Gardens Music Festival, taking place on March 7-8 and hosted by the City of Miami Gardens, promises to be an electrifying event with iconic performances. The lineup features legendary artists such as The Isley Brothers, Stephanie Mills, and El DeBarge, alongside contemporary stars like Jhené Aiko and Ludacris celebrating his 25th anniversary. Additionally, a special performance by Nelly & Ashanti adds to the excitement. This music festival, produced by the Black Promoters Collective, is not to be missed.

data.title: PasswordManager.com survey: 2 in 3 Americans use predictable password patterns in 2026, incl. simple patterns, DOB, pet names.
data.description: A recent survey by PasswordManager.com, a leading authority on password security, reveals concerning trends in Americans' password habits. Despite ongoing warnings about cybersecurity risks, many individuals still use easily guessable passwords such as simple patterns, dates of birth, and pet names. The survey, released on January 13, 2026, highlights that a significant number of people are not taking adequate measures to protect their online accounts. This behavior underscores the urgent need for improved password practices to ensure greater internet safety.

data.title: HBAR price expected to reach $0.16 by January 2026, currently at $0.12. Analysts predict consolidation before breakout.
data.description: The cryptocurrency HBAR is currently experiencing stable momentum at $0.12, with market analysts predicting a target price of $0.16 by the end of January. Technical analysis indicates a period of consolidation before a potential surge above the resistance level. The price forecast for HBAR is optimistic, showing signs of a potential breakout in the near future.

data.title: Urban Air named No. 1 Adventure Park for 8th year, celebrates 200 parks, ranks No. 178 on 2026 Franchise 500 list.
data.description: A popular brand recently marked a significant achievement by reaching its 200th park milestone. Urban Air Adventure Park, a part of Unleashed Brands focusing on youth enrichment, celebrated this accomplishment along with its franchise expansion and ongoing commitment to enhancing the guest experience. The brand was recognized as No. 178 on Entrepreneur magazine's 2026 ranking. This news was shared on January 13, 2026, in Dallas.

data.title: ARB price predicted to reach $0.25-$0.28 by Feb 2026. Short-term target $0.22, bullish breakout at $0.22, support at $0.20.
data.description: Summary of ARB Price Prediction: The short-term target for ARB is $0.22 within the next week. Looking ahead, the medium-term forecast estimates a range of $0.25 to $0.28 over the course of one month. A bullish breakout is expected at $0.22, while critical support is at $0.20.

data.title: Fujifilm announces new metallic Gold toner for REVORIA PRESS EC2100S and SC285S, expanding creative potential with total of six specialty toner options.
data.description: FUJIFILM North America Corporation's Business Innovation Division has launched metallic Gold toner for the REVORIA PRESS™ EC2100S and SC285S models. This marks the first time the company is offering this option, expanding the creative possibilities for digital print applications. Customers can now produce more dynamic designs with a total of six specialty toner options available.

data.title: Animate Bio shows AI-designed peptides reduce lung fibrosis, with lead peptide matching nintedanib in preclinical tests.
data.description: A recent report from Animate Bio in San Francisco revealed promising preclinical findings, indicating that two peptides created using artificial intelligence demonstrated a notable reduction in lung fibrosis and inflammation. The lead peptide showcased comparable efficacy to nintedanib, a commonly utilized treatment for such conditions. The study emphasized the potential of these AI-designed peptides in addressing lung-related health issues.

data.title: DSG Global appoints Lavonne Moon as Managing Director for Tech, AI, and Cybersecurity, with over 20 years of experience.
data.description: A renowned executive search and consulting company, DSG Global, based in Philadelphia, made a significant announcement today. Lavonne Moon has been appointed as the Managing Director and Practice Leader for Technology, AI, and Cybersecurity of the firm. With over 20 years of experience in leadership advisory and recruitment, Lavonne will spearhead the expansion of DSG Global's services in assisting organizations navigate digital transformation and enhance their cyber leadership capabilities. This move showcases DSG Global's commitment to addressing the demands of the contemporary business environment.

data.title: Inventor creates speech therapy game tokens for kids aged 4-9, aims to boost engagement and target speech sounds.
data.description: A speech/language pathologist from San Diego, California, introduced a novel method to target speech sounds for children aged 4 to 9. The new approach involves a range of play-based tasks to enhance engagement during therapy sessions. This innovative technique aims to make speech therapy more interactive and effective for young learners. The inventor shared this idea at a conference in Pittsburgh on January 13, 2026. The goal is to improve speech skills in a fun and stimulating way, catering to the specific needs of this age group.

data.title: Stan Kroenke is now America's largest landowner with almost 1 million acres in New Mexico; top 100 list for 2026 released.
data.description: In the latest ranking of the 100 largest landowners for 2026, Stan Kroenke has claimed the top position, surpassing others in the list. Red Emmerson secured the second spot, followed by John Malone at third, and Ted Turner at the fourth position. The shift in rankings was announced on January 13, 2026, in Des Moines, Iowa. Stan Kroenke solidified his position by acquiring nearly 1 million acres in New Mexico from the heirs of a notable estate, further solidifying his standing as the largest landholder in America.

data.title: Audrey Nuna starts $1M campaign for Luminos Fund post MrBeast Challenge. Nonprofit aids vulnerable kids in education.
data.description: A fundraising campaign has been initiated by award-winning singer Audrey Nuna in support of The Luminos Fund, an international nonprofit assisting vulnerable children in catching up and excelling in school. The campaign, welcomed by the fund, comes after Audrey Nuna's participation as a finalist in a competition. The initiative aims to raise vital funds for these children and their education.

data.title: TCL Note A1 NXTPAPER wins awards at CES, launches pre-sale with innovative display technology.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, in Irvine, California, the TCL Note A1 NXTPAPER was showcased at CES 2026. This e-note device, equipped with TCL's innovative NXTPAPER display technology, stood out for its immersive paper-like display. The device drew significant attention at the event for its cutting-edge visuals, attracting a large audience.

data.title: MGallery Collection reveals expansion plans for 2026 across captivating destinations worldwide. Paris, Jan 13, 2026 /PRNewswire.
data.description: Announcing a fresh initiative by MGallery Collection, featuring a range of alluring locations and warm hospitality. On January 13, 2026, MGallery Collection disclosed their latest offerings, spanning from the picturesque Noosa in Australia to the pristine Maldives waters, and from the scenic Oléron Island in France. This new chapter embodies the brand's commitment to providing enriching experiences in diverse destinations.

data.title: Inturai Ventures updates trading code to URAIF on U.S. OTC market, reflecting corporate rebrand. Shares now tradable on Trade Republic.
data.description: Investor@inturai.com has announced that the trading code for URAIF on the U.S. OTC market has been updated from URAI to URAIF, to match the Company's rebranding efforts. This change aligns its U.S. market presence with its global identity. The company's shares are currently available for trading on Trade Republic.
